data.name: DeletePromotionSubtitle
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this promotion?

data.name: DeleteWarningMsg
data.value: This action cannot be undone. When deleting this promotion:

data.name: DeleteWarningLoseInfo
data.value: All promotion information will be lost

data.name: DeleteWarningSoldProducts
data.value: Products already sold with this promotion will keep their prices

data.name: DeleteWarningNotAvailable
data.value: The promotion will no longer be available for future purchases
